Q1i. GENNOANS (gender no answer) must be blank or 1

Q2b. SEXORNHET (sexual orientation straight) must be blank or 1

Q2e. SEXORNOTH (sexual orientation other) must be blank or 1

Q2g. SEXORNNOAN (sexual orientation no answer) must be blank or 1

Q13. ADINAT (ADI national percentile) must be between 1 and 100, or 884, 885, 886, or 887

checks.short_desc: Living situation aligns with marital status
checks.full_desc: If Q3. MARISTAT (Marital status)= 2 or 5 (Widowed or Never married) then Q4. LIVSITUA (Living situation) should not equal 2 (Lives with spouse or partner)

checks.short_desc: Living situation aligns with marital status
checks.full_desc: If Q3. MARISTAT (Marital status) in (1,6) (Married or living as married) then Q4. LIVSITUA (Living situation) should equal 2 (Lives with spouse or partner)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q4. LIVSITUA (Living situation) =1 (Lives alone) then Q5. (Primary residence) should not equal 4 (skilled nursing facility, nursing home, hospital, or hospice)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q4. LIVSITUA (Living situation) =6 (Live in group home (e.g., assisted living, nursing home, convent)) then Q5. (Primary residence) should not equal 1 (Single- or multi-family private residence)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q4. LIVSITUA (Living situation) ne 6 (Live in group home (e.g., assisted living, nursing home, convent)) then Q5. RESIDENC (Primary residence) should not equal 3or 4 (Assisted living or skilled nursing facility, nursing home, hospital, or hospice)
If Q3. MARISTAT in (1,2,3,4) (Married, widowed, divorced, or separated) at previous visit then Q3. MARISTAT should not equal 5 (never married)

checks.short_desc: If CANCERMETA is blank then no type of metastatic cancer should be checked
checks.full_desc: If Q5m1b. CANCERMETA (Type of cancer: metastatic) is blank then both of the following variables must be blank: Q5m1b1. CANCMETBR, Q5m1b2. CANCMETOTH
If Q5m2f. CANCOTHER (Primary site of cancer: Other) is blank then Q5m2f1. CANCOTHERX (Specify other primary site of cancer) must be blank

checks.short_desc: If CANCERACTV in (0, 9) then no primary site of cancer should be checked
checks.full_desc: If Q5m. CANCERACTV (Cancer, primary or metastatic) in (0, 9) then all of the following variables must be blank: Q5m2a. CANCBLOOD, Q5m5m. CANCBREAST, Q5m2c. CANCCOLON, Q5m2d. CANCLUNG, Q5m2e. CANCPROST, Q5m2f. CANCOTHER

checks.short_desc: If CANCERACTV in (0, 9) then all type of cancer treatment should be blanked
checks.full_desc: If Q5m. CANCERACTV (Cancer, primary or metastatic) in (0, 9) then all of the following variables should be blank: Q5m3a. CANCRAD, Q5m3b. CANCRESECT, Q5m3c. CANCIMMUNO, Q5m3d. CANCBONE, Q5m3e. CANCCHEMO, Q5m3f. CANCHORM, Q5m3g. CANCTROTH
If Q5t. OTHERCOND (Other medical conditions or procedures) is 0 (Absent) or 9 (Unknown) then Q5t1. OTHCONDX (Specify other medical conditions or procedures) must be blank
If Q6d4. OTHANXDIS (Other anxiety disorder) is blank, 0, or 9 then Q6d4a. OTHANXDISX (Specify other anxiety disorder) must be blank
If Q6g. PSYCDIS (Other psychiatric disorders) is blank, 0, or 9 then Q6g1. PSYCDISX (Specify other psychiatric disorders) must be blank

If Q7b9. NOMENSOTH (Other reason participant has stopped having menstrual periods) is blank then Q7b9a. NOMENSOTHX (Specify other reason participant has stopped having menstrual periods) must be blank

checks.short_desc: If NOMENSAGE is blank or 888, then all reasons participant has stopped having menstrual periods must be blank
checks.full_desc: If Q7a. NOMENSAGE (age at last menstrual period?) is blank or =888, then all of the following variables must be blank: Q7b1. NOMENSNAT, Q7b2. NOMENSHYST, Q7b3. NOMENSSURG, Q7b4. NOMENSCHEM, Q7b5. NOMENSRAD, Q7b6. NOMENSORM, Q7b7. NOMENSESTR, Q7b8. NOMENSUNK, Q7b9. NOMENSOTH

If Q1g. ALCDRINKS (On a day when the participant drinks alcoholic beverages, how many standard drinks does the participant typically consume?) in (4, 5) (7-9 or 10+ drinks per day), then Q1h. ALCBINGE (In the past 12 months, how often did the participant have six or more drinks containing alcohol in one day?) should not = 0 (never)
If D1a Q20. EPILEP (Epilepsy) = 1 (present), then A5D2 Q4c. SEIZURES (Epilepsy and/or history of seizures) should = 1 (Recent/active)

checks.short_desc: CDRSUM must be equal to the sum of MEMORY, ORIENT, JUDGMENT, COMMUN, HOMEHOBB, PERSCARE if subqestions are not 99
checks.full_desc: If all of Q1. MEMORY, Q2. ORIENT, Q3. JUDGMENT, Q4. COMMUN, Q5. HOMEHOBB, Q6. PERSCARE ne 99, Q7. CDRSUM (CDR sum of boxes) must be equal to the sum of Q1. MEMORY, Q2. ORIENT, Q3. JUDGMENT, Q4. COMMUN, Q5. HOMEHOBB, Q6. PERSCARE

checks.short_desc: CDRSUM cannot have valid response if MEMORY, ORIENT, JUDGMENT, COMMUN, HOMEHOBB, or PERSCARE are missing (99)
checks.full_desc: If any of Q1. MEMORY, Q2. ORIENT, Q3. JUDGMENT, Q4. COMMUN, Q5. HOMEHOBB, Q6. PERSCARE are missing (99), then Q7. CDRSUM (CDR sum of boxes) must = 99

checks.short_desc: CDRGLOB cannot have valid response if MEMORY, ORIENT, JUDGMENT, COMMUN, HOMEHOBB, or PERSCARE are missing (99)
checks.full_desc: If any of Q1. MEMORY, Q2. ORIENT, Q3. JUDGMENT, Q4. COMMUN, Q5. HOMEHOBB, Q6. PERSCARE are missing (99), then Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) must = 99
If Form C2 Q1f. MOCATOTS (uncorrected MoCA total score) <4 then Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not equal 0 or 0.5 (No or questionable impairment)
If Form C2T Q1d. MOCBTOTS (uncorrected MoCA blind total score) <4 then Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not equal 0 or 0.5 (No or questionable impairment)
If Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) =0 (No) then B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not equal 2 or 3 (moderate or severe impairment)
If Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) =1 (Yes) then B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not equal 0 (no impairment)
If Form B9 Q9a. COGMEM (Memory)=0 then B4 Q1. MEMORY (Memory) should not equal 2 or 3 (moderate or severe impairment)
If Form B9 Q9a. COGMEM (Memory) = 1 (Yes) then B4 Q1. MEMORY (Memory) should not equal 0 (No impairment)
If Form B9 Q9b. COGORI (Orientation) = 0 (No) then B4 Q2. ORIENT (Orientation) should not equal 2 or 3 (moderate or severe impairment)
If Form B9 Q9b. COGORI (Orientation) = 1 (yes) then B4 Q2. ORIENT (Orientation) shoudl not equal 0 (No impairment)
If Form B9 Q9c. COGJUDG (Executive function) = 0 (No) then B4 Q3. JUDGMENT (Judgment) should not equal 2 or 3 (moderate or severe impairment)
If Form B9 Q9c. COGJUDG (Executive function) = 1 (yes) then B4 Q3. JUDGMENT (Judgment) should not equal 0 (No impairment)
If Form D1a Q3. DEMENTED (Demented) = 1 (Yes) then B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not equal 0 or 0.5 (No or questionable impairment)
If Form D1a Q2. NORMCOG (Normal cognition) =1 (Yes) then B4 Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should equal 0
If Form D1a Q2. NORMCOG (Normal cognition)= 1 (Yes) then B4 Q7. CDRSUM (CDR sum of boxes) should be <= 5
If Form B9 Q9d. COGLANG (Language) = 0 (no) then B4 Q10. CDRLANG (Language) should not equal 2 or 3 (moderate or severe impairment)
If Form B9 Q9d. COGLANG (Language) = 1 (yes) then B4 Q10. CDRLANG (Language) sould not equal 0 (No impairment)
If CDRGLOB != 99 and CDRGLOB[prev_vis] != 99, Q8. CDRGLOB (CDR global score) should not decrease by 1 or more points from the most recent visit

checks.short_desc: GDS total score is equal to sum of all valid questions for completed GDS
checks.full_desc: If all of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER) in (0,1), then Q16. GDS must equal sum of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER) where in (0,1)

checks.short_desc: GDS prorated total score if up to three of the 15 items =9 (Did not answer)
checks.full_desc: If up to 3 of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER)=9, then Q16. GDS must equal: ROUND((sum of all subquestions in (0,1)) + (sum of all subquestions in (0,1) / total number of items in (0,1)) * (total number of items = to 9))). View the UDSv4 Coding Guidebook for Form B6 for more details on the prorated algorithm

TREMPOST, Q3d. TREMKINE, Q3e. RIGIDARM, Q3f. RIGIDLEG, Q3g. DYSTARM, Q3h. DYSTLEG, Q3i. CHOREA , Q3j.AMPMOTOR, Q3k. AXIALRIG, Q3l. POSTINST, Q3m. MASKING, Q3n. STOOPED)

VFIELDCUT, Q4e. LIMBATAX, Q4f. MYOCLON, Q4g. UNISOMATO, Q4h. APHASIA, Q4i. ALIENLIMB, Q4j. HSPATNEG, Q4k. PSPOAGNO, Q4l. SMTAGNO, Q4m. OPTICATAX, Q4n. APRAXGAZE, Q4o. VHGAZEPAL, Q4p. DYSARTH, Q4q. APRAXSP)

checks.short_desc: TREMREST compared to Form B3 resting tremors
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q3b. TRESTRHD (tremor at rest - right hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q3c. TRESTLHD (tremor at rest - left hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q3d. TRESTRFT (tremor at rest - right foot)= 0 and Q3e. TRESTLFT (tremor at rest - left foot) = 0 (all normal)) then Q3b. TREMREST (limb tremor at rest) should not be equal to 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: TREMREST compared to Form B3 resting tremors
checks.full_desc: If (Form B3, Q3b. TRESTRHD (tremor at rest - right hand) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q3c. TRESTLHD (tremor at rest - left hand) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q3d. TRESTRFT (tremor at rest - right foot) in (1-4) or TRESTLFT (tremor at rest - left foot) in (1-4) (at least one is present)) then Q3b. TREMREST (limb tremor at rest) should not be equal to 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: TREMKINE compared to Form B3 active tremors
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q4a. TRACTRHD (action tremor - right hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q4b. TRACTLHD (action tremor - left hand) = 0 (all normal)) then Q3d. TREMKINE (limb tremor - kinetic) should not be equal to 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: TREMKINE compared to Form B3 active tremors
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q4a. TRACTRHD (action tremor - right hand) ne 0 or Form B3, Q4b. TRACTLHD (action tremor - left hand) ne 0 (at least one is present)) then Q3d. TREMKINE (limb tremor - kinetic) should not be equal to 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: RIGIDARM compared to Form B3 limb rigidity
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q5b. RIGDUPRT (rigidity - right upper extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5c. RIGDUPLF (rigidity - left upper extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5d. RIGDLORT (rigidity - right lower extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5e. RIGDLOLF (rigidity - left lower extremity) =0 (all normal)) then Q3e. RIGIDARM (limb rigidity - arm) should not equal 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: RIGIDARM compared to Form B3 limb rigidity
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q5b. RIGDUPRT (rigidity - right upper extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5c. RIGDUPLF (rigidity - left upper extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5d. RIGDLORT (rigidity - right lower extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5e. RIGDLOLF (rigidity - left lower extremity) in (1-4) (at least one is present)) then Q3e. RIGIDARM (limb rigidity - arm) should not equal 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: GAITABN compared to Form B3 gait
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and Form B3, Q12. GAIT (Gait) in (1-4) (Abormal), then Q5. GAITABN (Abnormal signs - gait) should not equal 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: STOOPED compared to form B3 stooped posture
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and Form B3, Q11. POSTURE (Posture) in (1-4) (abnormal posture), then Q3n. STOOPED (stooped posture) should not equal 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: POSTINST compared to form B3 postural instability
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and Q13. POSSTAB (Posture stability) in (1-4) (abnormal posture), then Q3l. POSTINST (postural instability) should not equal 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: NORMNREXAM compared to NORMNREXAM at previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMNREXAM(abnormal exam findings) is not blank and NORMNREXAM = 1 (abnormal findings present) at the previous UDS visit, then Q2. NORMNREXAM (abnormal exam findings) should equal 1 (abnormal findings present)

checks.full_desc: If Q3. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs) is not blank and PARKSIGN = 1 (Yes) at the previous UDS visit, then Q3. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: INMEMWORS aligns with co-participant report on B9
checks.full_desc: If A2 Q6. INMEMWORS (participant's memory is worse?)=1,2 (Yes) then B9 Q4. DECCOGIN (Co-participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: INMEMTROUB aligns with co-participant report on B9
checks.full_desc: If A2 Q7. INMEMTROUB (participant trouble remembering?)=4,5 (Often or very often) then B9 Q4. DECCOGIN (Co-participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: INMEMTEN aligns with co-participant report on B9
checks.full_desc: If A2 Q8. INMEMTEN (participant's memory compared to 10 years ago?)=4,5 (Much worse or a little worse) then B9 Q4. DECCOGIN (Co-participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)
If B8 Q3. PARKSIGN (parkinsonian signs) = 0 (No abnormal signs in this section are present), then Q17. MOMOPARK (motor symptoms suggestive of parkinsonism) should = 0 (No) or be blank
If B8 Q3m. MASKING (Facial expression) = 1 (present), then Q15f. MOFACE (Change in facial expression) should not be 0 (no)
If B8 Q3m. MASKING (Facial expression) = 0 (absent), then Q15f. MOFACE (Change in facial expression) should = 0 (No) or be blank
If B8 Q5. GAITABN (Gait) = 1 (present), then Q15a. MOGAIT (Gait disorder) should not be 0 (no)
If B8 Q5. GAITABN (Gait) = 0 (absent), then Q15a. MOGAIT (Gait disorder) should = 0 (No) or be blank

checks.short_desc: MCI or dementia diagnoses on D1a align with COGAGE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Form D1a Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (yes) or Form D1a Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) =1 (yes) then Q9i. COGAGE (Age that prominent cognitive problem began) should not be blank

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLIN on B9
checks.full_desc: If Form D1a Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Q7. DECCLIN (Participant experiencing symptoms or declines per clinician) should equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLIN on B9
checks.full_desc: If Form D1a Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then Q7. DECCLIN (Participant experiencing symptoms or declines per clinician) should equal 1 (Yes)
If A1 Q18. MEMWORS (participant's memory is worse?)=1,2 (Yes) then B9 Q1. DECCOG (Participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)
If A1 Q19. MEMTROUB (participant trouble remembering?)=4,5 (Often or very often) then B9 Q1. DECCOG (Co-participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)
If A1 Q20. MEMTEN (participant's memory compared to 10 years ago?)=4,5 (Much worse or a little worse) then B9 Q1. DECCOG (Co-participant-reported cognitive decline) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of cognitive-related symptoms aligns with age of cognitive decline in previous visit
checks.full_desc: If COGAGE is not blank or 777 and COGAGE[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q9i. COGAGE should equal B9 Q9i. COGAGE (If any of the cognitive symptoms in 9a-9h are present, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of mood-related symptoms aligns with previous visit
checks.full_desc: If BEHAGE is not blank or 7777 and BEHAGE[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q12g. BEHAGE should equal B9 Q12g. BEHAGE (If any of the mood-related behavioral symptoms in 12a-12f are present, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of changes in motor functions aligns with previous visit
checks.full_desc: If MOTORAGE is not blank or 777 and MOTORAGE[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q15h. MOTORAGE should equal B9 Q15h. MOTORAGE (If changes in motor function are present in 15a-15g, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: DECCLCOG compared to COGMEM, COGORI, COGJUDG, COGLANG, COGVIS, COGATTN, COGFLUC, COGOTHR
checks.full_desc: If DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) = 1 (Yes) then questions 9a-9h (COGMEM, COGORI, COGJUDG, COGLANG, COGVIS, COGATTN, COGFLUC and COGOTHR) should not all equal 0 or 9.

checks.short_desc: DECCLBE compared to BEAPATHY, BEDEP, BEANX, BEEUPH, BEIRRIT, BEAGIT, BEVHALL, BEAHALL, BEDEL, BEAGGRS, BEDISIN, BEPERCH, BEEMPATH, BEOBCOM, BEANGER, BESUBAB, BEREM, BEOTHR
checks.full_desc: If DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinicial) = 1 (Yes) then questions 12a-12t (BEAPATHY, BEDEP, BEANX, BEEUPH, BEIRRIT, BEAGIT, BEVHALL, BEAHALL, BEDEL, BEAGGRS, BEDISIN, BEPERCH, BEEMPATH, BEOBCOM, BEANGER, BESUBAB, BEREM, BEOTHR) should not all equal 0 or 9

checks.short_desc: DECCLMOT compared to MOGAIT, MOFALLS, MOSLOW, MOTREM, MOLIMB, MOFACE, MOSPEECH
checks.full_desc: If DECCLMOT (Motor symptoms) = 1 (Yes) then questions 15a -15g (MOGAIT, MOFALLS, MOSLOW, MOTREM, MOLIMB, MOFACE, MOSPEECH) should not all equal 0 or 9

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of psychosis and impulse control-related behavioral symptoms aligns with age of symptom onset in previous visit
checks.full_desc: If PSYCHAGE is not blank or 777 and PSYCHAGE[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q12l. PSYCHAGE should equal B9 Q12l. PSYCHAGE (If any of the psychosis and impulse control-related behavioral symptoms in 12h-12k are present, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of personality-related behavioral symptoms aligns with age of symptom onset in previous visit
checks.full_desc: If PERCHAGE is not blank or 777 and PERCHAGE[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q12s. PERCHAGE should equal B9 Q12s. PERCHAGE (If any of the personality-related behavioral symptoms in 12m-12r are present, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of dream-enactment behavior aligns with age of onset in previous visit
checks.full_desc: If BEREMAGO is not blank or 777 and BEREMAGO[prev_vis] is not blank or 777, previous visit B9 Q12t1. BEREMAGO should equal B9 Q12t1. BEREMAGO (IF YES, at what age did the dream enactment behavior begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of cognitive symptoms provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If COGAGE[prev_vis] is not between 9 and 110 or 777, then Q9i. COGAGE (If any of the cognitive symptoms in 9a-9h are present, at what age did they begin?) should not = 777

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of mood-related symptoms provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If BEHAGE[prev_vis] is not between 9 and 110 or 777, then Q12g. BEHAGE (If any of the mood-related behavioral symptoms in 12a-12f are present, at what age did they begin?) should not = 777

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of psychosis and impulse control-related behavioral symptoms provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If PSYCHAGE[prev_vis] is not between 9 and 110 or 777, then Q12l. PSYCHAGE (If any of the psychosis and impulse control-related behavioral symptoms in 12h-12k are present, at what age did they begin?) should not = 777

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of personality-related behavioral symptoms provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If PERCHAGE[prev_vis] is not between 9 and 110 or 777, then Q12s. PERCHAGE (If any of the personality-related behavioral symptoms in 12m-12r are present, at what age did they begin?) should not = 777

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of dream-enactment behavior provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If BEREMAGO[prev_vis] is not between 9 and 110 or 777, then Q12t1. BEREMAGO (IF YES, at what age did the dream enactment behavior begin?) should not = 777

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of cognitive-related symptoms provided at previous visit is valid
checks.full_desc: If MOTORAGE[prev_vis] is not between 15 and 110 or 777, then Q15h. MOTORAGE (If changes in motor function are present in 15a-15g, at what age did they begin?) should not = 777

Q1. DXMETHOD (Diagnosis method) cannot be blank
Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) cannot be blank
If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Q2a. SCD (Subjective cognitive decline?) cannot be blank
If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then Q2a. SCD (Subjective cognitive decline?) must be blank
If Q2a. SCD (Subjective cognitive decline?)=1 (Yes) then Q2b. SCDDXCONF (Is the subjective cognitive decline clinically meaningful?) cannot be blank
If Q2a. SCD (Subjective cognitive decline?) not = 1 then Q2b. SCDDXCONF (Is the subjective cognitive decline clinically meaningful?) must be blank
Q2b. SCDDXCONF (Is the subjective cognitive decline clinically meaningful?) must be an integer between 0 and 1
If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?) cannot be blank
If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?) must be blank
If (Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) or Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes)) then Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) must be blank
If (Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) or Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes)) then Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) must be blank

If (Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) or Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes)) then Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline) must be blank
If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=0 (No) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must be present
If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?) ne 0 then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must be blank

If (Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) or Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) or Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?)=1 (Yes)) then Q5a1. IMPNOMCIFU (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Evidence of functional impairment, but normal cognitive testing) must be blank

If (Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) or Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) or Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?)=1 (Yes)) then Q5a2. IMPNOMCICG (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Abnormal cognitive testing but no clinical concern) must be blank

checks.full_desc: If Q5a1. IMPNOMCIFU (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Evidence of functional impairment, but normal cognitive testing)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a2. IMPNOMCICG (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Abnormal cognitive testing but no clinical concern)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a3. IMPNOMCLCD (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Longstanding cognitive difficulties)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a4. IMPNOMCIO (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Other)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only some MCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI should be present
checks.full_desc: If only some MCI criteria met ((Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only the third MCI criteria is met then IMPNOMCI must be absent
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) must equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with determination on C2/C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2/C2T COGSTAT (overall appraisal) in (1,2) (Better than normal for age or normal for age), then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2
checks.full_desc: If Form C2 Q1f. MOCATOTS (uncorrected MoCA total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2T Q1d. MOCBTOTS (uncorrected MoCA blind total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) and Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 0 (No) or blank

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then either Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) or Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Both dementia and MBI cannot be present
checks.full_desc: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) then Q7. MBI (MBI?) cannot equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Dementia diagnosis aligns with the previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) at the previous UDS visit, then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: MAJDEPDX aligns with MAJDEPDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q10. MAJDEPDX (Major depressive disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q10. MAJDEPDX (Major depressive disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: OTHDEPDX aligns with OTHDEPDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q11. OTHDEPDX (Other specified depressive disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q11. OTHDEPDX (Other specified depressive disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: BIPOLDX aligns with BIPOLDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q12. BIPOLDX (Bipolar disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q12. BIPOLDX (Bipolar disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: SCHIZOP aligns with SCHIZOP from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q13. SCHIZOP (Schizophrenia or other psychotic disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q13. SCHIZOP (Schizophrenia or other psychotic disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: ANXIET aligns with ANXIET from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q14. ANXIET (Anxiety disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q14. ANXIET (Anxiety disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: GENANX aligns with GENANX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q14b. GENANX (Generalized Anxiety Disorder) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q14b. GENANX (Generalized Anxiety Disorder) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: PANICDISDX aligns with PANICDISDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q14c. PANICDISDX (Panic Disorder) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q14c. PANICDISDX (Panic Disorder) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: OCDDX aligns with OCDDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q14d. OCDDX (OCD) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q14d. OCDDX (OCD) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: PTSDDX aligns with PTSDDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q15. PTSDDX (PTSD (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q15. PTSDDX (PTSD (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: NDEVDIS aligns with NDEVDIS from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q16. NDEVDIS (Developmental neuropsychiatric disorders (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q16. NDEVDIS (Developmental neuropsychiatric disorders (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: OTHPSY aligns with OTHPSY from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q18. OTHPSY (Other psychiatric disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q18. OTHPSY (Other psychiatric disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: TBIDX aligns with TBIDX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q19. TBIDX (Traumatic brain injury (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q19. TBIDX (Traumatic brain injury (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: EPILEP aligns with EPILEP from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q20. EPILEP (Epilepsy (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q20. EPILEP (Epilepsy (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: HYCEPH aligns with HYCEPH from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q21. HYCEPH (Normal-pressure hydrocephalus (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q21. HYCEPH (Normal-pressure hydrocephalus (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: HIV aligns with HIV from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q23. HIV (HIV infection (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q23. HIV (HIV infection (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: APNEADX aligns with APNEADX from previous visit
checks.full_desc: If Q25. APNEADX (Sleep apnea (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q25. APNEADX (Sleep apnea (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: At least one cognitive diagnosis, including normal cognitition & behavior, should be "present"
checks.full_desc: At least one of the following should equal 1: Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?), Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?), Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?), Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?), Q7. MBI (MBI?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset is not older than age of participant at visit

checks.short_desc: Living situation aligns with marital status
checks.full_desc: If Q11. MARISTAT (Marital status)= 2 or 5 (Widowed or Never married) then Q12. LIVSITUA (Living situation) should not equal 2 (Lives with spouse or partner)

checks.short_desc: Living situation aligns with marital status
checks.full_desc: If Q11. MARISTAT (Marital status) in (1,6) (Married or living as married) then Q12. LIVSITUA (Living situation) should equal 2 (Lives with spouse or partner)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q12. LIVSITUA (Living situation) =1 (Lives alone) then Q13. (Primary residence) should not equal 4 (skilled nursing facility, nursing home, hospital, or hospice)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q12. LIVSITUA (Living situation) =6 (Live in group home (e.g., assisted living, nursing home, convent)) then Q13. (Primary residence) should not equal 1 (Single- or multi-family private residence)

checks.short_desc: Primary residence aligns with living situation
checks.full_desc: If Q12. LIVSITUA (Living situation) ne 6 (Live in group home (e.g., assisted living, nursing home, convent)) then Q13. RESIDENC (Primary residence) should not equal 3 or 4 (Assisted living or skilled nursing facility, nursing home, hospital, or hospice)

checks.short_desc: ETHISPANIC aligns with HISPANIC from UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 IVP Q8. HISPANIC (Hispanic/Latino ethnicity) = 1, then UDSv4 Q3d. ETHISPANIC (Race--Hispanic or Latino) should equal 1

checks.short_desc: RACEAIAN aligns with RACE, RACESEC, and RACETER from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: RACEASIAN aligns with RACERACE, RACESEC, and RACETER from UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 IVP Q9-11. RACE, RACESEC, or RACETER = 5 (asian), then UDSv4 Q3b. RACEASIAN (Race--Asian) should equal 1

checks.short_desc: RACEBLACK aligns with RACERACE, RACESEC, and RACETER from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: RACENHPI aligns with RACERACE, RACESEC, and RACETER from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: RACEWHITE aligns with RACERACE, RACESEC, and RACETER from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: PREDOMLAN aligns with PRIMLANG from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: EDUC should be greater than or equal to EDUC from UDSv3

checks.short_desc: HANDED aligns with HANDED from UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 IVP Q12. HANDED = 1 (Left handed), then UDSv4 Q9. HANDED should equal 1 (Left handed)

checks.short_desc: HANDED aligns with HANDED from UDSv3

If UDSv3 FVP Q4. MARISTAT in (1,2,3,4) (Married, widowed, divorced, or separated) at previous UDS visit then UDSv4 Q11. MARISTAT should not equal 5 (never married)

checks.short_desc: Consisitency in family/friend contact across forms

INCNTFRQ (primary contact freq w/participant)= 6 (less than once a month), then Q22. CHILDCOMM (Frequency of communication with children?) should be <= 2 or 8 (several times a year or less, or prefer not to answer)

checks.short_desc: Consisitency in family/friend contact across forms
checks.full_desc: If Form A2, Q0d. MODEA2 is not equal to 0 (Form not completed), and Form A2 Q1. INRELTO (relationship to participant) = 2 (Child) and Form A2 Q4a1. INCNTFRQ (primary contact freq w/participant) is < 6 (more than monthly), then Q22. CHILDCOMM (Frequency of communication with children?) should be > 2 or 8 (several times a month or more, or prefer not to answer)

checks.short_desc: Consisitency in family/friend contact across forms

INCNTFRQ (primary contact freq w/participant) should not equal 6 (less than once a month), then Q23. FRIENDCOMM (Frequency of communication with friends?) should be <=2 or 8 (several times a year or less, or prefer not to answer)

checks.short_desc: MOMYOB should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv4 Q1a1. MOMYOB (Mom birth year) is not equal to 9999 (Unknown) and UDSv3 Q5a2. MOMYOB (Mom birth year) is not equal to 9999 (Unknown), then UDSv4 Q1a1. MOMYOB (Mom birth year) should be equal to UDSv3 Q5a2. MOMYOB (Mom birth year) at the previous visit where UDSv3 MOMYOB is not blank

checks.short_desc: MOMDAGE should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv4 Q1a2. MOMDAGE (Mom death age) is not equal to 888 or 999 (Not applicable or Unknown) and UDSv3 Q5a3. MOMDAGE (Mom death age) is not equal to 888 or 999 (Not applicable or Unknown), then UDSv4 Q1a2. MOMDAGE (Mom death age) should be equal to UDSv3 Q5a3. MOMDAGE (Mom death age) at the previous visit where MOMDAGE is not blank

checks.short_desc: MOMETPR should align with MOMNEUR in UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q5a4. MOMNEUR (Mom neurological problem) <8 (Mom has a neurological problem or psychiatric condition) at the previous visit where MOMNEUR is not blank, then UDSv4 Q1a3. MOMETPR (Mom primary dx) should not equal 00 (No known neurological/psychiatric diagnosis)

checks.short_desc: DADYOB should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv4 Q1b1. DADYOB (Dad birth year) is not equal to 9999 (Unknown) and UDSv3 Q5b2. DADYOB (Dad birth year) is not equal to 9999 (Unknown), then UDSv4 Q1b1. DADYOB (Dad birth year) should be equal to UDSv3 Q5b2. DADYOB (Dad birth year) at the previous visit where UDSv3 DADYOB is not blank

checks.short_desc: DADDAGE should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv4 Q1b2. DADDAGE (Dad death age) is not equal to 888 or 999 (Not applicable or Unknown) and UDSv3 Q5b3. DADDAGE (Dad death age) is not equal to 888 or 999 (Not applicable or Unknown), then UDSv4 Q1b2. DADDAGE (Dad death age) should be equal to UDSv3 Q5b3. DADDAGE (Dad death age) at the previous visit where DADDAGE is not blank

checks.short_desc: DADETPR should align with DADNEUR in UDSv3
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q5b4. DADNEUR (Dad neurological problem) <8 (Dad has a neurological problem or psychiatric condition) at the previous visit where DADNEUR is not blank, then UDSv4 Q1b3. DADETPR (Dad primary dx) should not equal 00 (No known neurological/psychiatric diagnosis)

checks.short_desc: SIBS should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: UDSv4 Q2. SIBS (How many siblings?) should be equal to UDSv3 Q6. SIBS (How many siblings?) at the previous visit where SIBS is not blank

checks.short_desc: KIDS should be the same as UDSv3
checks.full_desc: UDSv4 Q3. KIDS (How many biological children?) should be equal to UDSv3 Q7. KIDS (How many biological children?) at the previous visit where KIDS is not blank

checks.short_desc: GDS total score is equal to sum of all valid questions for completed GDS
checks.full_desc: If all of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER) in (0,1), then Q16. GDS must equal sum of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER) where in (0,1)

checks.short_desc: GDS prorated total score if up to three of the 15 items =9 (Did not answer)
checks.full_desc: If up to 3 of (Q1. SATIS, Q2. DROPACT, Q3. EMPTY, Q4. BORED, Q5. SPIRITS, Q6. AFRAID, Q7. HAPPY, Q8. HELPLESS, Q9. STAYHOME, Q10. MEMPROB, Q11. WONDRFUL, Q12. WRTHLESS, Q13. ENERGY, Q14. HOPELESS, Q15. BETTER)=9, then Q16. GDS must equal: ROUND((sum of all subquestions in (0,1)) + (sum of all subquestions in (0,1) / total number of items in (0,1)) * (total number of items = to 9))). View the UDSv4 Coding Guidebook for Form B6 for more details on the prorated algorithm

TREMPOST, Q3d. TREMKINE, Q3e. RIGIDARM, Q3f. RIGIDLEG, Q3g. DYSTARM, Q3h. DYSTLEG, Q3i. CHOREA , Q3j.AMPMOTOR, Q3k. AXIALRIG, Q3l. POSTINST, Q3m. MASKING, Q3n. STOOPED)

checks.short_desc: Parkinsionian signs compared to Form D1a Lewy body syndrome

checks.short_desc: Parkinsionian signs compared to Form D1a Lewy body syndrome

checks.short_desc: Parkinsionian signs compared to Form D1a Lewy body syndrome type

checks.short_desc: Parkinsionian signs compared to Form D1a Lewy body syndrome type

checks.short_desc: Parkinsionian signs compared to Form D1b Lewy body etiology

checks.full_desc: If Q3. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs?)=0 (absent) then Form D1b, Q13. LBDIS (Lewy body disease) should not equal 1 (present)

TRESTLHD (tremor at rest - left hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q3d. TRESTRFT (tremor at rest - right foot)= 0 and Q3e. TRESTLFT (tremor at rest - left foot) = 0 (all normal)) then Q3b. TREMREST (limb tremor at rest) should not be equal to 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: RIGIDARM compared to Form B3 limb rigidity

VFIELDCUT, Q4e. LIMBATAX, Q4f. MYOCLON, Q4g. UNISOMATO, Q4h. APHASIA, Q4i. ALIENLIMB, Q4j. HSPATNEG, Q4k. PSPOAGNO, Q4l. SMTAGNO, Q4m. OPTICATAX, Q4n. APRAXGAZE, Q4o. VHGAZEPAL, Q4p. DYSARTH, Q4q. checks.short_desc: TREMREST compared to Form B3 resting tremors
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q3b. TRESTRHD (tremor at rest - right hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q3c. TRESTLHD (tremor at rest - left hand) = 0 and Form B3, Q3d. TRESTRFT (tremor at rest - right foot)= 0 and Q3e. TRESTLFT (tremor at rest - left foot) = 0 (all normal)) then Q3b. TREMREST (limb tremor at rest) should not be equal to 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: TREMREST compared to Form B3 resting tremors
checks.full_desc: If (Form B3, Q3b. TRESTRHD (tremor at rest - right hand) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q3c. TRESTLHD (tremor at rest - left hand) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q3d. TRESTRFT (tremor at rest - right foot) in (1-4) or TRESTLFT (tremor at rest - left foot) in (1-4) (at least one is present)) then Q3b. TREMREST (limb tremor at rest) should not be equal to 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: TREMKINE compared to Form B3 active tremors

TRACTLHD (action tremor - left hand) = 0 (all normal)) then Q3d. TREMKINE (limb tremor - kinetic) should not be equal to 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: TREMKINE compared to Form B3 active tremors
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q4a. TRACTRHD (action tremor - right hand) ne 0 or Form B3, Q4b. TRACTLHD (action tremor - left hand) ne 0 (at least one is present)) then Q3d. TREMKINE (limb tremor - kinetic) should not be equal to 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: RIGIDARM compared to Form B3 limb rigidity
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q5b. RIGDUPRT (rigidity - right upper extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5c. RIGDUPLF (rigidity - left upper extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5d. RIGDLORT (rigidity - right lower extremity) =0 and Form B3, Q5e. RIGDLOLF (rigidity - left lower extremity) =0 (all normal)) then Q3e. RIGIDARM (limb rigidity - arm) should not equal 1-3 (present: focal/unilateral, bilateral/symmetric, bilateral/asymmetric)

checks.short_desc: RIGIDARM compared to Form B3 limb rigidity
checks.full_desc: If Form B3 Q0d. MODEB3 != 0 (Form completed) and (Form B3, Q5b. RIGDUPRT (rigidity - right upper extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5c. RIGDUPLF (rigidity - left upper extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5d. RIGDLORT (rigidity - right lower extremity) in (1-4) or Form B3, Q5e. RIGDLOLF (rigidity - left lower extremity) in (1-4) (at least one is present)) then Q3e. RIGIDARM (limb rigidity - arm) should not equal 0 (absent)

checks.short_desc: GAITABN compared to Form B3 gait

checks.short_desc: STOOPED compared to form B3 stooped posture

checks.short_desc: POSTINST compared to form B3 postural instability

checks.short_desc: NORMNREXAM compared to UDSv3 NORMEXAM at previous visit

checks.short_desc: PARKSIGN compared to UDSv3 PARKSIGN at previous visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv4 Q3. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs?) is not blank and UDSv3 Q2. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs) = 1 (Yes) at the previous UDS visit, then UDSv4 Q3. PARKSIGN (Parkinsonian signs?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLIN on B9

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of mood-related symptoms aligns with UDSv3

BEAGE (Based on the clinician's assessment, at what age did the behavioral symptoms begin?) should equal B9 Q12g. BEHAGE ( If any of the mood-related behavioral symptoms in 12a-12f are present, at what age did they begin?)

checks.short_desc: Age of onset of changes in motor functions aligns with UDSv3

checks.short_desc: At least one source of information used to assess the clinical syndrome must be checked

checks.short_desc: If all MCI criteria met then MCI must be present
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If less than 3 MCI criteria met then MCI must be absent
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: If any IMPNOCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI must be present
checks.full_desc: If Q5a1. IMPNOMCIFU (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Evidence of functional impairment, but normal cognitive testing)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a2. IMPNOMCICG (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Abnormal cognitive testing but no clinical concern)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a3. IMPNOMCLCD (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Longstanding cognitive difficulties)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a4. IMPNOMCIO (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Other)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only some MCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI should be present
checks.full_desc: If only some MCI criteria met ((Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only the third MCI criteria is met then IMPNOMCI must be absent
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) must equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with determination on C2/C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2/C2T COGSTAT (overall appraisal) in (1,2) (Better than normal for age or normal for age), then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2
checks.full_desc: If Form C2 Q1f. MOCATOTS (uncorrected MoCA total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2T Q1d. MOCBTOTS (uncorrected MoCA blind total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) and Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 0 (No) or blank

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then either Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) or Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Both dementia and MBI cannot be present
checks.full_desc: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) then Q7. MBI (MBI?) cannot equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: At least one cognitive diagnosis, including normal cognitition & behavior, should be "present"
checks.full_desc: At least one of the following should equal 1: Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?), Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?), Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?), Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?), Q7. MBI (MBI?)

checks.short_desc: If all MCI criteria met then MCI must be present
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If less than 3 MCI criteria met then MCI must be absent
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met) or Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?) must equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: If any IMPNOCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI must be present
checks.full_desc: If Q5a1. IMPNOMCIFU (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Evidence of functional impairment, but normal cognitive testing)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a2. IMPNOMCICG (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Abnormal cognitive testing but no clinical concern)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a3. IMPNOMCLCD (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Longstanding cognitive difficulties)=1 (Criteria met) or Q5a4. IMPNOMCIO (Cognitively impaired, not MCI reason - Other)=1 (Criteria met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only some MCI criteria met then IMPNOMCI should be present
checks.full_desc: If only some MCI criteria met ((Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN ne 1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN ne 1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP=1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1) or (Q4a1. MCICRITCLN=1 and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP ne 1 and Q4a3. MCICRITFUN=1)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: If only the third MCI criteria is met then IMPNOMCI must be absent
checks.full_desc: If (Q4a3. MCICRITFUN (MCI criteria - Preserved functional independence OR functional dependence not related to cog decline)=1 (Criteria met) and Q4a1. MCICRITCLN (MCI criteria - Clinical concern about decline in cognition) ne 1 (Criteria not met) and Q4a2. MCICRITIMP (MCI criteria - Impairment in one or more cognitive domains) ne 1 (Criteria not met)) then Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?) must equal 0 (No)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with determination on C2/C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2/C2T COGSTAT (overall appraisal) in (1,2) (Better than normal for age or normal for age), then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2
checks.full_desc: If Form C2 Q1f. MOCATOTS (uncorrected MoCA total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Cognitive diagnoses on D1a align with MoCA scores on C2T
checks.full_desc: If Form C2T Q1d. MOCBTOTS (uncorrected MoCA blind total score) <4 then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=1 (Yes) then Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) and Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 0 (No) or blank

checks.short_desc: Normal diagnosis on D1a aligns with DECCLCOG & DECCLBE on B9
checks.full_desc: If Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?)=0 (No) then either Form B9 Q8. DECCLCOG (Impaired cognition per clinician) or Form B9 Q11. DECCLBE (Participant experiencing behavioral symptoms per clinician) should equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Dementia diagnosis aligns with the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) at the previous UDS visit, then Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?) should not equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: Both dementia and MBI cannot be present
checks.full_desc: If Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?)=1 (Yes) then Q7. MBI (MBI?) cannot equal 1 (Yes)

checks.short_desc: At least one cognitive diagnosis, including normal cognitition & behavior, should be "present"
checks.full_desc: At least one of the following should equal 1: Q2. NORMCOG (Unimpaired cognition & behavior?), Q3. DEMENTED (Dementia?), Q4b. MCI (MCI (amnestic or non-amnestic)?), Q5b. IMPNOMCI (Cognitively impaired, not MCI?), Q7. MBI (MBI?)

checks.short_desc: BIPOLDX aligns with BIPOLDX from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q27. BIPOLDX (Bipolar disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q12. BIPOLDX (Bipolar disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: SCHIZOP aligns with SCHIZOP from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q28. SCHIZOP (Schizophrenia or other psychotic disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q13. SCHIZOP (Schizophrenia or other psychotic disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: ANXIET aligns with ANXIET from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q29. ANXIET (Anxiety disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q14. ANXIET (Anxiety disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: PTSDDX aligns with PTSDDX from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q31. PTSDDX (PTSD (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q15. PTSDDX (PTSD (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: OTHPSY aligns with OTHPSY from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q32. OTHPSY (Other psychiatric disorder (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q18. OTHPSY (Other psychiatric disorder (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: EPILEP aligns with EPILEP from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q22. EPILEP (Epilepsy (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q20. EPILEP (Epilepsy (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: HYCEPH aligns with HYCEPH from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q21. HYCEPH (Normal-pressure hydrocephalus (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q21. HYCEPH (Normal-pressure hydrocephalus (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

checks.short_desc: HIV aligns with HIV from the previous UDSv3 visit
checks.full_desc: If UDSv3 Q24. HIV (HIV infection (present)) = 1 (present) at the previous visit, then Q23. HIV (HIV infection (present)) should not be 0 or blank (Absent)

BIOMFTLD3 (Other biomarker modality - Consistent with FTLD) =1, then Q14. FTLD (Frontotemporal lobar degeneration) should = 1
If Q7a3. STRUCTCVD (Consistent with cerebrovascular disease (CVD)) =1 then Q15. CVD (Vascular brain injury) should = 1
If Q6b. AMYLCSF (abnormally low amyloid CSF) or Q6f. CSFTAU (abnormally elevated CSF tau or ptau) at previous visit = 1, then Q4a. CSFAD (CSF-based biomarkers - Consistent with AD) should =1
If Q6a. AMYLPET (abnormal amyloid PET) at previous visit = 1, then Q6a1. AMYLPET (Elevated amyloid) should =1
If Q6e. TAUPETAD (Tau PET evidence for AD) at previous visit = 1, then Q6a2. TAUPET (Elevated tau pathology) should =1
If Q6c. FDGAD (FDG-PET pattern of AD) at previous visit = 1, then Q6b1. FDGAD (FDG PET - Consistent with AD should =1
If Q6j. DATSCAN (DATscan) at previous visit = 1, then Q6c. DATSCANDX (Was DAT Scan data or information used to support an etiological diagnosis?) should =1
If Q7a. IMAGLINF (large vessel infarct) at previous visit = 1, then Q7a3a. IMAGLINF (Large vessel infarct(s)) should =1
If Q7c. IMAGMACH (macrohemorrhage) at previous visit = 1, then Q7a3c. IMAGMACH (Macrohemorrhage(s)) should =1
If Q7d. IMAGMICH (microhemorrhage) at previous visit = 1, then Q7a3d. IMAGMICH (Microhemorrhage(s)) should =1
If Q7e. IMAGMWMH (moderate white matter hyperintensities) or Q7f. IMAGEWMH (extensive white matter hyperintensities) at previous visit = 1, then Q7a3e. IMAGWMH (White-matter hyperintensity) should =1

If Q8. ADMUT (dominantly inherited AD mutation) or Q9. FTLDMUT (dominantly inherited FTLD mutation) or Q10. OTHMUT (hereditary mutation other than an AD or FTLD mutation) at previous visit = 1, then Q11. AUTDOMMUT (Is there an autosomal dominant pathogenic variant to support an etiological diagnosis?) should =1
If Q7b. IMAGLAC (lacunar infarct) at previous visit = 1, then Q7a3b. IMAGLAC (Lacunar infarct(s)) should =1
